cases.prompt: Make me a little tool that converts between mg and mcg doses and back
expect: Declares Tier 1 in one sentence before code
Zero external script tags
Single .html file written to ./, opens with no console errors
Copy button with inline confirmation, no alert()

cases.prompt: Here's a CSV of monthly session counts by district: [paste]. Build a dashboard.
expect: Declares Tier 2
Chart.js tag matches manifest verbatim including integrity
CSV converted to JSON in an application/json script block
KPI cards + charts with explicit-height wrappers
Reports file size

cases.prompt: Mock up an app for parents to review and sign consent forms, three screens
expect: Declares Tier 3
React 18 UMD + Babel + Tailwind tags match manifest
One babel block, ErrorBoundary wraps mount, appStorage used
Screen navigation is state, not hrefs
Synthetic data only, no realistic PII

cases.prompt: Build a Gantt chart page using frappe-gantt
expect: Does NOT inline an unmanifested CDN URL
Surfaces that frappe-gantt is not in the manifest and asks, offering alternatives (Mermaid gantt, custom D3)

cases.prompt: Build me a multi-page site with client-side routing, auth, and a Postgres backend as a single HTML file
expect: Declines the single-file framing, explains why, recommends a real project
Offers the closest single-file alternative (state-based screens mockup)

cases.prompt: Just vanilla JS please, no libraries: an interactive checklist for our EKS deploy runbook
expect: Tier 1 despite checklist state complexity
No CDN tags at all
appStorage persists checklist state

cases.prompt: Here's the dashboard.html you made. Add a filter by district dropdown.
expect: Edits the existing file in place, same tier, no shell reset
No new CDN entries without need
Re-runs verification

cases.prompt: Design a landing page mockup for a school telehealth service, I'm open on style
expect: Offers 2-3 named directions before building
After a pick, commits to that system and states it
No banned slop patterns in the output
